untranslatable_reason: This signal requires domain-specific fixed income derivatives metrics (rho sensitivity, interest rate forecasts, option deltas, calendar spreads, forward prices) that are not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal depends on: (1) external interest rate forecasts with confidence levels, (2) rho (interest rate sensitivity) calculations for options, (3) delta equality across strikes, and (4) time spread analysis between contracts. None of these can be expressed using price action, technical indicators, or available OHLCV data alone.
translation_notes: NATENBERG_DRY_72_0 is a fixed income/derivatives trading rule specific to time spreads and interest rate positioning. It requires external data inputs (interest rate forecasts, economic calendar events) and Greeks-based calculations (rho, delta) that fall outside the scope of technical analysis indicators. This rule would require: (1) a dedicated interest rate forecast module, (2) Greek calculation engine for options, (3) spread-specific pricing models. Cannot be expressed in the allowed technical indicator framework.
